# Instrument of the Bards, Anstruth Harp

An Instrument of the Bards is superior to an ordinary instrument in every way. Seven types of these instruments exist, each named after a bard college. A creature that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 2d4 Psychic damage.

You can play Anstruth Harp to cast one of the following spells: [[fly]], [[invisibility]], [[levitate]], [[protection_from_evil_and_good from Evil and Good]], [[cure_wounds Wounds]] (level 5), [[ice_storm Storm]], and [[wall_of_thorns of Thorns]]. Once the Anstruth Harp has been used to cast a spell, it can't be used to cast that spell again until the next dawn. The spells use your spellcasting ability and spell save DC.
